title: Bahrain Open Banking Framework
summary: Sets the technical and governance framework for open banking implementation, including operational guidelines, security standards, customer experience rules, open API specifications, and safeguards to protect customer data.

theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Provides operational, security, API, and governance standards for open banking data sharing.
theme_notes.digital_finance.open_banking: National open banking framework for Bahrain.
theme_notes.digital_finance.fintech_sandboxes: Framework supporting fintech innovation in open banking.

notes: Related instruments: Supports CBB Rulebook GR-6 Open Banking and Volume 5 Module OB
